queries.reconstructed_sql_run: SELECT T1.BusinessEntityID, SUM(T1.SalesQuota) FROM SalesPerson AS T1 INNER JOIN SalesPersonQuotaHistory AS T2 ON T1.BusinessEntityID = T2.BusinessEntityID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.QuotaDate) = '2011' GROUP BY T1.BusinessEntityID ORDER BY SUM(T1.SalesYTD) DESC, T1.BusinessEntityID ASC LIMIT 1

queries.reconstructed_sql_run: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.ProductLine = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Product AS T1 INNER JOIN ProductVendor AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID INNER JOIN Vendor AS T3 ON T2.BusinessEntityID = T3.BusinessEntityID GROUP BY T1.ProductID HAVING COUNT(T1.Name) > 2
